title: Sustainability | Purbachal Apparel Limited
meta_desc: Purbachal Apparel Limited's commitment to sustainability: solar energy, ethical manufacturing, worker welfare, and environmental responsibility.
hero_desc: At Purbachal Apparel, sustainability is not an afterthought — it is woven into the fabric of everything we do.

pillars.title: Environmental Responsibility
pillars.text: We are investing in renewable energy, targeting 300 KW of solar capacity, reducing water consumption, and minimizing waste across all operations.

pillars.title: Social Compliance
pillars.text: Fair wages, safe working conditions, and zero tolerance for forced labor. Over 60% of our workforce are women, supported by welfare programs and continuous training.

pillars.title: Ethical Governance
pillars.text: Transparent supply chains, third-party audits, and strict compliance with international standards ensure we operate with the highest integrity.

initiatives.title: Solar Energy Transition
initiatives.text: Working toward 300 KW solar energy capacity to reduce our carbon footprint.

initiatives.title: Water Conservation
initiatives.text: Implementing water recycling systems to minimize consumption in production.

initiatives.title: Waste Reduction
initiatives.text: Fabric waste reduction programs and recycling initiatives across all departments.

initiatives.title: Worker Welfare
initiatives.text: Health check-ups, childcare support, and financial literacy programs for all workers.

initiatives.title: Fair Trade Practices
initiatives.text: Ensuring fair wages above minimum wage and transparent working hours.

initiatives.title: Community Investment
initiatives.text: Supporting local schools, healthcare facilities, and skill development centers.

csr.title: Health & Safety
csr.text: State-of-the-art safety equipment and regular drills for all 2,000+ workers.

csr.title: Education Support
csr.text: Funding education programs for workers' children and local community youth.

csr.title: Green Manufacturing
csr.text: ISO 14001 certified environmental management system across all facilities.
